---
name: "🚀 Feature Request / Mathematical Extension"
about: Suggest an enhancement, CUDA acceleration, or additional academic proof validations.
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement, academic-validation
assignees: ryujinchoi
---

## 💡 Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear description of the computational bottleneck or mathematical limitation you are facing.

## ⚡ Describe the Proposed Solution
A concise description of the architectural extension, optimization algorithm, or formula rewrite you would like to implement.

## 🔬 Mathematical / Physical Justification
If this modifies core logic (e.g., the Exponential Boltzmann Attenuation Model or Symmetric Graph Laplacian constraints), please provide a brief theoretical rationale.

## 🔗 Additional Context
Add any other context, references to papers, or external links regarding this enhancement.
Official Repository Reference: https://github.com
